scripts.name: Clear Temp Files
scripts.description: Deletes files in the OS temp directory older than 7 days.

scripts.name: List Startup Items
scripts.description: Reports what's configured to launch at system startup (read-only).

scripts.name: Disk Space Report
scripts.description: Reports free/used space per mounted volume (read-only).

scripts.name: Large Files Report
scripts.description: Finds large files under your home folder without deleting anything.

scripts.name: Browser Cache Report
scripts.description: Estimates local browser cache sizes for common Chromium-based browsers.

scripts.name: Network Report
scripts.description: Summarizes network interfaces, default gateway, and active connections.

scripts.name: Windows Services Report
scripts.description: Lists auto-start Windows services and highlights unsigned-looking paths (read-only).
